safetyTips.title: Flood Safety
tips: Avoid walking or driving through floodwaters.
Turn off electricity at the main switch if safe to do so.

safetyTips.title: Fire Safety
tips: Stay low to avoid smoke inhalation.
Check doors for heat before opening.

safetyTips.title: Earthquake Safety
tips: Stay away from windows and heavy furniture.
Move to open areas after shaking stops.

safetyTips.title: Heatwave Safety
tips: Avoid outdoor activities during peak heat hours.
